name: Penne W/Garlic Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. The 6 cloves of garlic is really a head of garlic. Slice the top off.
Place in an oven pan and drizzle olive oil over it. Roast for about 3/4 hour at 250°C (about 450°F).
2. Cook the penne according to package instructions, leaving about 1 minute al dente.
Rinse and coat with olive oil to prevent sticking together.
3. Sauce: In a skillet over high heat, add olive oil and finely chopped bacon. Cook until golden.
Add the roasted garlic head by squeezing out the soft cloves into the pan.
Cook for a while to reduce. Stir occasionally.
4. Add white wine. Continue to reduce. Add cream, tomato, and basil. Continue to reduce.
5. Slowly stir in grated Parmesan until smooth.
6. When reduction is complete, add penne and cook through.
